  with commands</a>

  happening under the hood</a>

- <a href="build-server.html#next-steps"
  class="break-words py-1 block hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300">Next
  steps</a>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

class="relative grow box-border flex-col w-full mx-auto px-1 lg:pl-[23.7rem] lg:-ml-12 xl:w-[calc(100%-28rem)]">

<div class="mt-0.5 space-y-2.5">

<div class="eyebrow h-5 text-primary dark:text-primary-light text-sm font-semibold">

Develop with MCP

</div>

<div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-start sm:items-center relative gap-2 min-w-0">

# Build an MCP server

<div id="page-context-menu"
class="items-center shrink-0 min-w-[156px] justify-end ml-auto sm:flex hidden">

src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4" />Copy page

src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="transition-transform text-gray-400 overflow-visible group-hover:text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-600 dark:group-hover:text-gray-400 rotate-90" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="mt-2 text-lg prose prose-gray dark:prose-invert [&>*]:[overflow-wrap:anywhere]">

Get started building your own server to use in Claude for Desktop and
other clients.

</div>

<div id="page-context-menu"
class="flex items-center shrink-0 min-w-[156px] mt-3 sm:hidden">

<div class="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-center font-medium">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4" />Copy page

</div>

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="transition-transform text-gray-400 overflow-visible group-hover:text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-600 dark:group-hover:text-gray-400 rotate-90" />

<div id="content"
class="mdx-content @container/columns-container relative mt-8 prose prose-gray dark:prose-invert [contain:inline-size] isolate empty:hidden mb-14"
page-title="Build an MCP server" page-href="/docs/develop/build-server">

<span data-as="p">In this tutorial, we’ll build a simple MCP weather
server and connect it to a host, Claude for Desktop.</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#what-we’ll-be-building"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">What we’ll be building</span>

<span data-as="p">We’ll build a server that exposes two tools:
`get_alerts` and `get_forecast`. Then we’ll connect the server to an MCP
host (in this case, Claude for Desktop):</span>

<div>

<div class="frame p-2 not-prose relative bg-gray-50/50 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden dark:bg-gray-800/25 print:print-color-exact"
data-name="frame">

<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-grid-neutral-200/20 [mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,#fff,rgba(255,255,255,0.6))] dark:bg-grid-white/5 dark:[mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.1),rgba(255,255,255,0.5))] print:print-color-exact"
style="background-position:10px 10px">

</div>

<div class="relative rounded-xl overflow-hidden flex justify-center">

<span aria-owns="rmiz-modal-" rmiz=""><span rmiz-content="not-found"
style="visibility:visible"><img
src="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/current-weather.png?fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=dce7b2f8a06c20ba358e4bd2e75fa4c7"
class="object-contain" style="aspect-ratio:2780 / 1849"
data-path="images/current-weather.png" decoding="async"
sizes="(max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px"
srcset="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/current-weather.png?w=280&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=bbb19f34c5df59f66bc6bbb75d2bc5ed 280w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/current-weather.png?w=560&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=2392d7e765b897c5b78f9f53d41439d4 560w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/current-weather.png?w=840&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=dc349e75341b046d35a649762774da49 840w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/current-weather.png?w=1100&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=deeb99214d9383ee4a0c8aaacb120049 1100w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/current-weather.png?w=1650&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=5c6f948059635e376deeadce3893e9b9 1650w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/current-weather.png?w=2500&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=3922160478785cc88d5e98d418e8f7dd 2500w"
data-optimize="true" width="2780" height="1849" /></span></span>

</div>

<div class="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none border border-black/5 rounded-2xl dark:border-white/5">

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20"
callout-type="note">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">Servers can connect to any client. We’ve chosen Claude
for Desktop here for simplicity, but we also have guides on
<a href="build-client.html" class="link">building your own client</a> as
well as a
<a href="../../clients.html" class="link">list of other clients here</a>.</span>

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#core-mcp-concepts"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Core MCP Concepts</span>

<span data-as="p">MCP servers can provide three main types of
capabilities:</span>

1.  **<a href="../learn/server-concepts.html#resources"
    class="link">Resources</a>**: File-like data that can be read by
    clients (like API responses or file contents)
2.  **<a href="../learn/server-concepts.html#tools" class="link">Tools</a>**:
    Functions that can be called by the LLM (with user approval)
3.  **<a href="../learn/server-concepts.html#prompts" class="link">Prompts</a>**:
    Pre-written templates that help users accomplish specific tasks

<span data-as="p">This tutorial will primarily focus on tools.</span>

<div id="python" class="tabs tabs tab-container">

- <div id="python">

  <div class="flex text-sm items-center gap-1.5 leading-6 font-semibold whitespace-nowrap pt-3 pb-2.5 -mb-px max-w-max border-b text-primary dark:text-primary-light border-current"

  Python

  </div>

  </div>

<div>

<div id="panel-python-0"
class="prose dark:prose-dark overflow-x-auto [&_[data-table-wrapper]]:![--page-padding:0px] [&_[role="listitem"]]:pl-4 [&>:first-child:not(p)]:mt-0 [&>:first-child:not(p)_img]:mt-0 [&>:first-child[data-table-wrapper]]:!pt-0"
role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="python" component-part="tab-content">

<span data-as="p">Let’s get started with building our weather server! <a
href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/quickstart-resources/tree/main/weather-server-python"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">You can find the complete
code for what we’ll be building here.</a></span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#prerequisite-knowledge"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Prerequisite knowledge</span>

<span data-as="p">This quickstart assumes you have familiarity
with:</span>

- Python
- LLMs like Claude

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#logging-in-mcp-servers"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Logging in MCP Servers</span>

<span data-as="p">When implementing MCP servers, be careful about how
you handle logging:</span><span data-as="p">**For STDIO-based servers:**
Never write to stdout. Writing to stdout will corrupt the JSON-RPC
messages and break your server. The `print()` function writes to stdout
by default, but can be used safely with
`file=sys.stderr`.</span><span data-as="p">**For HTTP-based servers:**
Standard output logging is fine since it doesn’t interfere with HTTP
responses.</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#best-practices"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Best Practices</span>

- Use a logging library that writes to stderr or files.

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#quick-examples"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Quick Examples</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="11" language="python">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
import sys
import logging

# ❌ Bad (STDIO)
print("Processing request")

# ✅ Good (STDIO)
print("Processing request", file=sys.stderr)

# ✅ Good (STDIO)
logging.info("Processing request")
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#system-requirements"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">System requirements</span>

- Python 3.10 or higher installed.
- You must use the Python MCP SDK 1.2.0 or higher.

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#set-up-your-environment"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Set up your environment</span>

<span data-as="p">First, let’s install `uv` and set up our Python
project and environment:</span>

<div class="code-group p-0.5 mt-5 mb-8 flex flex-col not-prose relative rounded-2xl border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 min-w-0 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:codeblock-dark text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light"
dir="ltr" orientation="horizontal">

<div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 relative pr-2.5 *:first:*:ml-2.5"
component-part="code-group-tab-bar">

<div class="flex-1 w-0 text-xs leading-6 rounded-tl-xl gap-1 flex overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
role="tablist" aria-orientation="horizontal" tabindex="-1"
orientation="horizontal" style="outline:none">

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

macOS/Linux

</div>

<div class="absolute -bottom-1.5 left-0 right-0 h-0.5 rounded-full bg-primary dark:bg-primary-light peer-empty/title:hidden">

</div>

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

Windows

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex items-center justify-end shrink-0 gap-1.5">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden">

<div id="radix-_R_1269ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-0"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="active" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_1269ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-0"
tabindex="-1" style="animation-duration:0s">

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-auto overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:100%;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre flex-none text-sm h-full leading-6"
component-part="code-group-tab-content">

``` shiki
curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"

``` shiki
# Create a new directory for our project
uv init weather
cd weather

# Create virtual environment and activate it
uv venv
source .venv/bin/activate

# Install dependencies
uv add "mcp[cli]" httpx

# Create our server file
touch weather.py
```

###

<span class="cursor-pointer">Importing packages and setting up the
instance</span>

<span data-as="p">Add these to the top of your `weather.py`:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="11" language="python">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
from typing import Any

import httpx
from mcp.server.fastmcp import FastMCP

# Initialize FastMCP server
mcp = FastMCP("weather")

# Constants
NWS_API_BASE = "https://api.weather.gov"
USER_AGENT = "weather-app/1.0"
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">The FastMCP class uses Python type hints and
docstrings to automatically generate tool definitions, making it easy to
create and maintain MCP tools.</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#helper-functions"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Helper functions</span>

<span data-as="p">Next, let’s add our helper functions for querying and
formatting the data from the National Weather Service API:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="22" language="python">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
async def make_nws_request(url: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
    """Make a request to the NWS API with proper error handling."""
    headers = {"User-Agent": USER_AGENT, "Accept": "application/geo+json"}
    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
        try:
            response = await client.get(url, headers=headers, timeout=30.0)
            response.raise_for_status()
            return response.json()
        except Exception:
            return None


def format_alert(feature: dict) -> str:
    """Format an alert feature into a readable string."""
    props = feature["properties"]
    return f"""
Event: {props.get("event", "Unknown")}
Area: {props.get("areaDesc", "Unknown")}
Severity: {props.get("severity", "Unknown")}
Description: {props.get("description", "No description available")}
Instructions: {props.get("instruction", "No specific instructions provided")}
"""
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#implementing-tool-execution"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Implementing tool execution</span>

<span data-as="p">The tool execution handler is responsible for actually
executing the logic of each tool. Let’s add it:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="55" language="python">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
@mcp.tool()
async def get_alerts(state: str) -> str:
    """Get weather alerts for a US state.

    Args:
        state: Two-letter US state code (e.g. CA, NY)
    """
    url = f"{NWS_API_BASE}/alerts/active/area/{state}"
    data = await make_nws_request(url)

    if not data or "features" not in data:
        return "Unable to fetch alerts or no alerts found."

    if not data["features"]:
        return "No active alerts for this state."

    alerts = [format_alert(feature) for feature in data["features"]]
    return "\n---\n".join(alerts)


@mcp.tool()
async def get_forecast(latitude: float, longitude: float) -> str:
    """Get weather forecast for a location.

    Args:
        latitude: Latitude of the location
        longitude: Longitude of the location
    """
    # First get the forecast grid endpoint
    points_url = f"{NWS_API_BASE}/points/{latitude},{longitude}"
    points_data = await make_nws_request(points_url)

    if not points_data:
        return "Unable to fetch forecast data for this location."

    # Get the forecast URL from the points response
    forecast_url = points_data["properties"]["forecast"]
    forecast_data = await make_nws_request(forecast_url)

    if not forecast_data:
        return "Unable to fetch detailed forecast."

    # Format the periods into a readable forecast
    periods = forecast_data["properties"]["periods"]
    forecasts = []
    for period in periods[:5]:  # Only show next 5 periods
        forecast = f"""
{period["name"]}:
Temperature: {period["temperature"]}°{period["temperatureUnit"]}
Wind: {period["windSpeed"]} {period["windDirection"]}
Forecast: {period["detailedForecast"]}
"""
        forecasts.append(forecast)

    return "\n---\n".join(forecasts)
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
def main():
    # Initialize and run the server
    mcp.run(transport="stdio")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Your server is complete! Run `uv run weather.py` to
start the MCP server, which will listen for messages from MCP
hosts.</span><span data-as="p">Let’s now test your server from an
existing MCP host, Claude for Desktop.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#testing-your-server-with-claude-for-desktop"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Testing your server with Claude for
Desktop</span>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20"
callout-type="note">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">Claude for Desktop is not yet available on Linux.
Linux users can proceed to the
<a href="build-client.html" class="link">Building a client</a> tutorial
to build an MCP client that connects to the server we just built.</span>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">First, make sure you have Claude for Desktop
installed.
<a href="https://claude.ai/download" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">You can install the latest version here.</a> If you
already have Claude for Desktop, **make sure it’s updated to the latest
version.**</span><span data-as="p">We’ll need to configure Claude for
Desktop for whichever MCP servers you want to use. To do this, open your
Claude for Desktop App configuration at
`~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json` in a
text editor. Make sure to create the file if it doesn’t
exist.</span><span data-as="p">For example, if you have
<a href="https://code.visualstudio.com/" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">VS Code</a> installed:</span>

<div class="code-group p-0.5 mt-5 mb-8 flex flex-col not-prose relative rounded-2xl border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 min-w-0 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:codeblock-dark text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light"
dir="ltr" orientation="horizontal">

<div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 relative pr-2.5 *:first:*:ml-2.5"
component-part="code-group-tab-bar">

role="tablist" aria-orientation="horizontal" tabindex="-1"
orientation="horizontal" style="outline:none">

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

</div>

<div class="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden">

<div id="radix-_R_2m69ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-0"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="active" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_2m69ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-0"

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-auto overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:100%;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre flex-none text-sm h-full leading-6"
component-part="code-group-tab-content">

``` shiki
code ~/Library/Application\ Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

<div id="radix-_R_2m69ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-1"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"

tabindex="-1">

</div>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">You’ll then add your servers in the `mcpServers` key.
The MCP UI elements will only show up in Claude for Desktop if at least
one server is properly configured.</span><span data-as="p">In this case,
we’ll add our single weather server like so:</span>

<div class="code-group p-0.5 mt-5 mb-8 flex flex-col not-prose relative rounded-2xl border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 min-w-0 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:codeblock-dark text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light"
dir="ltr" orientation="horizontal">

<div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 relative pr-2.5 *:first:*:ml-2.5"
component-part="code-group-tab-bar">

<div class="flex-1 w-0 text-xs leading-6 rounded-tl-xl gap-1 flex overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
role="tablist" aria-orientation="horizontal" tabindex="-1"
orientation="horizontal" style="outline:none">

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

macOS/Linux

</div>

<div class="absolute -bottom-1.5 left-0 right-0 h-0.5 rounded-full bg-primary dark:bg-primary-light peer-empty/title:hidden">

</div>

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

Windows

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex items-center justify-end shrink-0 gap-1.5">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden">

<div id="radix-_R_2s69ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-0"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="active" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_2s69ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-0"
tabindex="-1" style="animation-duration:0s">

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-auto overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:100%;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre flex-none text-sm h-full leading-6"
component-part="code-group-tab-content">

``` shiki
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "weather": {
      "command": "uv",
      "args": [
        "--directory",
        "/ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/PARENT/FOLDER/weather",
        "run",
        "weather.py"
      ]
    }
  }
}
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<div id="radix-_R_2s69ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-1"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="inactive" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_2s69ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-1" hidden=""
tabindex="-1">

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-yellow-200 bg-yellow-50 dark:border-yellow-900 dark:bg-yellow-600/20 [&_[data-component-part='callout-icon']]:mt-px"
callout-type="warning">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="flex-none size-5 text-yellow-800 dark:text-yellow-300" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-yellow-800 dark:text-yellow-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">You may need to put the full path to the `uv`
executable in the `command` field. You can get this by running
`which uv` on macOS/Linux or `where uv` on Windows.</span>

</div>

</div>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20"
callout-type="note">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">Make sure you pass in the absolute path to your
server. You can get this by running `pwd` on macOS/Linux or `cd` on
Windows Command Prompt. On Windows, remember to use double backslashes
(`\\`) or forward slashes (`/`) in the JSON path.</span>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">This tells Claude for Desktop:</span>

1.  There’s an MCP server named “weather”
2.  To launch it by running
    `uv --directory /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/PARENT/FOLDER/weather run weather.py`

<span data-as="p">Save the file, and restart **Claude for
Desktop**.</span>

</div>

<div id="panel-typescript-1"
class="prose dark:prose-dark overflow-x-auto [&_[data-table-wrapper]]:![--page-padding:0px] [&_[role="listitem"]]:pl-4 [&>:first-child:not(p)]:mt-0 [&>:first-child:not(p)_img]:mt-0 [&>:first-child[data-table-wrapper]]:!pt-0 hidden"
role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="typescript"
component-part="tab-content">

<span data-as="p">Let’s get started with building our weather server! <a
href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/quickstart-resources/tree/main/weather-server-typescript"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">You can find the complete
code for what we’ll be building here.</a></span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#prerequisite-knowledge-2"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Prerequisite knowledge</span>

<span data-as="p">This quickstart assumes you have familiarity
with:</span>

- TypeScript
- LLMs like Claude

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#logging-in-mcp-servers-2"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Logging in MCP Servers</span>

<span data-as="p">When implementing MCP servers, be careful about how
you handle logging:</span><span data-as="p">**For STDIO-based servers:**
Never use `console.log()`, as it writes to standard output (stdout) by
default. Writing to stdout will corrupt the JSON-RPC messages and break
your server.</span><span data-as="p">**For HTTP-based servers:**
Standard output logging is fine since it doesn’t interfere with HTTP
responses.</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#best-practices-2"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Best Practices</span>

- Use `console.error()` which writes to stderr, or use a logging library
  that writes to stderr or files.

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#quick-examples-2"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Quick Examples</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="5" language="javascript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
// ❌ Bad (STDIO)
console.log("Server started");

// ✅ Good (STDIO)
console.error("Server started"); // stderr is safe
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#system-requirements-2"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">System requirements</span>

<span data-as="p">For TypeScript, make sure you have the latest version
of Node installed.</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#set-up-your-environment-2"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Set up your environment</span>

<span data-as="p">First, let’s install Node.js and npm if you haven’t
already. You can download them from
<a href="https://nodejs.org/" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">nodejs.org</a>. Verify your Node.js
installation:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="2" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
node --version
npm --version
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">For this tutorial, you’ll need Node.js version 16 or
higher.</span><span data-as="p">Now, let’s create and set up our
project:</span>

<div class="code-group p-0.5 mt-5 mb-8 flex flex-col not-prose relative rounded-2xl border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 min-w-0 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:codeblock-dark text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light"
dir="ltr" orientation="horizontal">

<div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 relative pr-2.5 *:first:*:ml-2.5"
component-part="code-group-tab-bar">

<div class="flex-1 w-0 text-xs leading-6 rounded-tl-xl gap-1 flex overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
role="tablist" aria-orientation="horizontal" tabindex="-1"
orientation="horizontal" style="outline:none">

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

macOS/Linux

</div>

<div class="absolute -bottom-1.5 left-0 right-0 h-0.5 rounded-full bg-primary dark:bg-primary-light peer-empty/title:hidden">

</div>

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

Windows

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex items-center justify-end shrink-0 gap-1.5">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden">

<div id="radix-_R_18a9ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-0"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="active" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_18a9ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-0"
tabindex="-1" style="animation-duration:0s">

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-auto overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:100%;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre flex-none text-sm h-full leading-6"
component-part="code-group-tab-content">

``` shiki
# Create a new directory for our project
mkdir weather
cd weather

# Initialize a new npm project
npm init -y

# Install dependencies
npm install @modelcontextprotocol/sdk zod@3
npm install -D @types/node typescript

# Create our files
mkdir src
touch src/index.ts
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<div id="radix-_R_18a9ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-1"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="inactive" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_18a9ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-1" hidden=""
tabindex="-1">

</div>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Update your package.json to add type: “module” and a
build script:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark p-0.5"
numberoflines="10" language="json">

<div class="flex text-gray-400 text-xs rounded-t-[14px] leading-6 font-medium pl-4 pr-2.5 py-1"
component-part="code-block-header">

<div class="flex-grow-0 flex items-center gap-1.5 text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 min-w-0"
component-part="code-block-header-filename">

<span class="truncate min-w-0" title="package.json">package.json</span>

</div>

<div class="flex-1 flex items-center justify-end gap-1.5 print:hidden">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
{
  "type": "module",
  "bin": {
    "weather": "./build/index.js"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "build": "tsc && chmod 755 build/index.js"
  },
  "files": ["build"]
}
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Create a `tsconfig.json` in the root of your
project:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark p-0.5"
numberoflines="15" language="json">

<div class="flex text-gray-400 text-xs rounded-t-[14px] leading-6 font-medium pl-4 pr-2.5 py-1"
component-part="code-block-header">

<div class="flex-grow-0 flex items-center gap-1.5 text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 min-w-0"
component-part="code-block-header-filename">

<span class="truncate min-w-0"
title="tsconfig.json">tsconfig.json</span>

</div>

<div class="flex-1 flex items-center justify-end gap-1.5 print:hidden">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2022",
    "module": "Node16",
    "moduleResolution": "Node16",
    "outDir": "./build",
    "rootDir": "./src",
    "strict": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true
  },
  "include": ["src/**/*"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules"]
}
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Now let’s dive into building your server.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

<span class="cursor-pointer">Building your server</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a
href="build-server.html#importing-packages-and-setting-up-the-instance-2"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

<span class="cursor-pointer">Importing packages and setting up the
instance</span>

<span data-as="p">Add these to the top of your `src/index.ts`:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="12" language="typescript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
import { McpServer } from "@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/mcp.js";
import { StdioServerTransport } from "@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/stdio.js";
import { z } from "zod";

const NWS_API_BASE = "https://api.weather.gov";
const USER_AGENT = "weather-app/1.0";

// Create server instance
const server = new McpServer({
  name: "weather",
  version: "1.0.0",
});
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#helper-functions-2"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Helper functions</span>

<span data-as="p">Next, let’s add our helper functions for querying and
formatting the data from the National Weather Service API:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="66" language="typescript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
// Helper function for making NWS API requests
async function makeNWSRequest<T>(url: string): Promise<T | null> {
  const headers = {
    "User-Agent": USER_AGENT,
    Accept: "application/geo+json",
  };

  try {
    const response = await fetch(url, { headers });
    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`HTTP error! status: ${response.status}`);
    }
    return (await response.json()) as T;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Error making NWS request:", error);
    return null;
  }
}

interface AlertFeature {
  properties: {
    event?: string;
    areaDesc?: string;
    severity?: string;
    status?: string;
    headline?: string;
  };
}

// Format alert data
function formatAlert(feature: AlertFeature): string {
  const props = feature.properties;
  return [
    `Event: ${props.event || "Unknown"}`,
    `Area: ${props.areaDesc || "Unknown"}`,
    `Severity: ${props.severity || "Unknown"}`,
    `Status: ${props.status || "Unknown"}`,
    `Headline: ${props.headline || "No headline"}`,
    "---",
  ].join("\n");
}

interface ForecastPeriod {
  name?: string;
  temperature?: number;
  temperatureUnit?: string;
  windSpeed?: string;
  windDirection?: string;
  shortForecast?: string;
}

interface AlertsResponse {
  features: AlertFeature[];
}

interface PointsResponse {
  properties: {
    forecast?: string;
  };
}

interface ForecastResponse {
  properties: {
    periods: ForecastPeriod[];
  };
}
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#implementing-tool-execution-2"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Implementing tool execution</span>

<span data-as="p">The tool execution handler is responsible for actually
executing the logic of each tool. Let’s add it:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="148" language="typescript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
// Register weather tools

server.registerTool(
  "get_alerts",
  {
    description: "Get weather alerts for a state",
    inputSchema: {
      state: z
        .string()
        .length(2)
        .describe("Two-letter state code (e.g. CA, NY)"),
    },
  },
  async ({ state }) => {
    const stateCode = state.toUpperCase();
    const alertsUrl = `${NWS_API_BASE}/alerts?area=${stateCode}`;
    const alertsData = await makeNWSRequest<AlertsResponse>(alertsUrl);

    if (!alertsData) {
      return {
        content: [
          {
            type: "text",
            text: "Failed to retrieve alerts data",
          },
        ],
      };
    }

    const features = alertsData.features || [];
    if (!features.length) {
      return {
        content: [
          {
            type: "text",
            text: `No active alerts for ${stateCode}`,
          },
        ],
      };
    }

    const formattedAlerts = features.map(formatAlert);
    const alertsText = `Active alerts for ${stateCode}:\n\n${formattedAlerts.join("\n")}`;

    return {
      content: [
        {
          type: "text",
          text: alertsText,
        },
      ],
    };
  },
);

server.registerTool(
  "get_forecast",
  {
    description: "Get weather forecast for a location",
    inputSchema: {
      latitude: z
        .number()
        .min(-90)
        .max(90)
        .describe("Latitude of the location"),
      longitude: z
        .number()
        .min(-180)
        .max(180)
        .describe("Longitude of the location"),
    },
  },
  async ({ latitude, longitude }) => {
    // Get grid point data
    const pointsUrl = `${NWS_API_BASE}/points/${latitude.toFixed(4)},${longitude.toFixed(4)}`;
    const pointsData = await makeNWSRequest<PointsResponse>(pointsUrl);

    if (!pointsData) {
      return {
        content: [
          {
            type: "text",
            text: `Failed to retrieve grid point data for coordinates: ${latitude}, ${longitude}. This location may not be supported by the NWS API (only US locations are supported).`,
          },
        ],
      };
    }

    const forecastUrl = pointsData.properties?.forecast;
    if (!forecastUrl) {
      return {
        content: [
          {
            type: "text",
            text: "Failed to get forecast URL from grid point data",
          },
        ],
      };
    }

    // Get forecast data
    const forecastData = await makeNWSRequest<ForecastResponse>(forecastUrl);
    if (!forecastData) {
      return {
        content: [
          {
            type: "text",
            text: "Failed to retrieve forecast data",
          },
        ],
      };
    }

    const periods = forecastData.properties?.periods || [];
    if (periods.length === 0) {
      return {
        content: [
          {
            type: "text",
            text: "No forecast periods available",
          },
        ],
      };
    }

    // Format forecast periods
    const formattedForecast = periods.map((period: ForecastPeriod) =>
      [
        `${period.name || "Unknown"}:`,
        `Temperature: ${period.temperature || "Unknown"}°${period.temperatureUnit || "F"}`,
        `Wind: ${period.windSpeed || "Unknown"} ${period.windDirection || ""}`,
        `${period.shortForecast || "No forecast available"}`,
        "---",
      ].join("\n"),
    );

    const forecastText = `Forecast for ${latitude}, ${longitude}:\n\n${formattedForecast.join("\n")}`;

    return {
      content: [
        {
          type: "text",
          text: forecastText,
        },
      ],
    };
  },
);
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#running-the-server-2"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Running the server</span>

<span data-as="p">Finally, implement the main function to run the
server:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="10" language="typescript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
async function main() {
  const transport = new StdioServerTransport();
  await server.connect(transport);
  console.error("Weather MCP Server running on stdio");
}

main().catch((error) => {
  console.error("Fatal error in main():", error);
  process.exit(1);
});
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Make sure to run `npm run build` to build your server!
This is a very important step in getting your server to
connect.</span><span data-as="p">Let’s now test your server from an
existing MCP host, Claude for Desktop.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a
href="build-server.html#testing-your-server-with-claude-for-desktop-2"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Testing your server with Claude for
Desktop</span>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20"
callout-type="note">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">Claude for Desktop is not yet available on Linux.
Linux users can proceed to the
<a href="build-client.html" class="link">Building a client</a> tutorial
to build an MCP client that connects to the server we just built.</span>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">First, make sure you have Claude for Desktop
installed.
<a href="https://claude.ai/download" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">You can install the latest version here.</a> If you
already have Claude for Desktop, **make sure it’s updated to the latest
version.**</span><span data-as="p">We’ll need to configure Claude for
Desktop for whichever MCP servers you want to use. To do this, open your
Claude for Desktop App configuration at
`~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json` in a
text editor. Make sure to create the file if it doesn’t
exist.</span><span data-as="p">For example, if you have
<a href="https://code.visualstudio.com/" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">VS Code</a> installed:</span>

<div class="code-group p-0.5 mt-5 mb-8 flex flex-col not-prose relative rounded-2xl border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 min-w-0 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:codeblock-dark text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light"
dir="ltr" orientation="horizontal">

<div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 relative pr-2.5 *:first:*:ml-2.5"
component-part="code-group-tab-bar">

``` shiki
code ~/Library/Application\ Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json
```

</div>

style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

<div id="radix-_R_2sa9ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-1"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
