tabindex="-1">

</div>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">This tells Claude for Desktop:</span>

1.  There’s an MCP server named “weather”
2.  Launch it by running
    `java -jar /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/PARENT/FOLDER/weather/build/libs/weather-0.1.0-all.jar`

<span data-as="p">Save the file, and restart **Claude for
Desktop**.</span>

</div>

<div id="panel-c%23-4"
class="prose dark:prose-dark overflow-x-auto [&_[data-table-wrapper]]:![--page-padding:0px] [&_[role="listitem"]]:pl-4 [&>:first-child:not(p)]:mt-0 [&>:first-child:not(p)_img]:mt-0 [&>:first-child[data-table-wrapper]]:!pt-0 hidden"
role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="c%23" component-part="tab-content">

<span data-as="p">Let’s get started with building our weather server! <a
href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/csharp-sdk/tree/main/samples/QuickstartWeatherServer"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">You can find the complete
code for what we’ll be building here.</a></span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#prerequisite-knowledge-4"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Prerequisite knowledge</span>

<span data-as="p">This quickstart assumes you have familiarity
with:</span>

- C#
- LLMs like Claude
- .NET 8 or higher

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#logging-in-mcp-servers-5"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Logging in MCP Servers</span>

<span data-as="p">When implementing MCP servers, be careful about how
you handle logging:</span><span data-as="p">**For STDIO-based servers:**
Never use `Console.WriteLine()` or `Console.Write()`, as they write to
standard output (stdout). Writing to stdout will corrupt the JSON-RPC
messages and break your server.</span><span data-as="p">**For HTTP-based
servers:** Standard output logging is fine since it doesn’t interfere
with HTTP responses.</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#best-practices-5"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Best Practices</span>

- Use a logging library that writes to stderr or files.

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#system-requirements-5"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">System requirements</span>

- <a href="https://dotnet.microsoft.com/download/dotnet/8.0" class="link"
  target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">.NET 8 SDK</a> or higher installed.

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#set-up-your-environment-5"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Set up your environment</span>

<span data-as="p">First, let’s install `dotnet` if you haven’t already.
You can download `dotnet` from
<a href="https://dotnet.microsoft.com/download/" class="link"
target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">official Microsoft .NET website</a>.
Verify your `dotnet` installation:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="1" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
dotnet --version
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Now, let’s create and set up your project:</span>

<div class="code-group p-0.5 mt-5 mb-8 flex flex-col not-prose relative rounded-2xl border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 min-w-0 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:codeblock-dark text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light"
dir="ltr" orientation="horizontal">

<div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 relative pr-2.5 *:first:*:ml-2.5"
component-part="code-group-tab-bar">

<div class="flex-1 w-0 text-xs leading-6 rounded-tl-xl gap-1 flex overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
role="tablist" aria-orientation="horizontal" tabindex="-1"
orientation="horizontal" style="outline:none">

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

macOS/Linux

</div>

<div class="absolute -bottom-1.5 left-0 right-0 h-0.5 rounded-full bg-primary dark:bg-primary-light peer-empty/title:hidden">

</div>

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

Windows

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex items-center justify-end shrink-0 gap-1.5">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden">

<div id="radix-_R_12m9ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-0"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="active" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_12m9ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-0"
tabindex="-1" style="animation-duration:0s">

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-auto overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:100%;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre flex-none text-sm h-full leading-6"
component-part="code-group-tab-content">

``` shiki
# Create a new directory for our project
mkdir weather
cd weather
# Initialize a new C# project
dotnet new console
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<div id="radix-_R_12m9ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-1"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="inactive" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_12m9ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-1" hidden=""
tabindex="-1">

</div>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">After running `dotnet new console`, you will be
presented with a new C# project. You can open the project in your
favorite IDE, such as
<a href="https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/" class="link"
target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">Visual Studio</a> or
<a href="https://www.jetbrains.com/rider/" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">Rider</a>. Alternatively, you can create a C#
application using the <a
href="https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/visualstudio/get-started/csharp/tutorial-console?view=vs-2022"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">Visual Studio project
wizard</a>. After creating the project, add NuGet package for the Model
Context Protocol SDK and hosting:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="4" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
# Add the Model Context Protocol SDK NuGet package
dotnet add package ModelContextProtocol --prerelease
# Add the .NET Hosting NuGet package
dotnet add package Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Now let’s dive into building your server.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#building-your-server-5"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Building your server</span>

<span data-as="p">Open the `Program.cs` file in your project and replace
its contents with the following code:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="21" language="csharp">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting;
using ModelContextProtocol;
using System.Net.Http.Headers;

var builder = Host.CreateEmptyApplicationBuilder(settings: null);

builder.Services.AddMcpServer()
    .WithStdioServerTransport()
    .WithToolsFromAssembly();

builder.Services.AddSingleton(_ =>
{
    var client = new HttpClient() { BaseAddress = new Uri("https://api.weather.gov") };
    client.DefaultRequestHeaders.UserAgent.Add(new ProductInfoHeaderValue("weather-tool", "1.0"));
    return client;
});

var app = builder.Build();

await app.RunAsync();
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20"
callout-type="note">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">When creating the `ApplicationHostBuilder`, ensure you
use `CreateEmptyApplicationBuilder` instead of `CreateDefaultBuilder`.
This ensures that the server does not write any additional messages to
the console. This is only necessary for servers using STDIO
transport.</span>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">This code sets up a basic console application that
uses the Model Context Protocol SDK to create an MCP server with
standard I/O transport.</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#weather-api-helper-functions-2"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Weather API helper functions</span>

<span data-as="p">Create an extension class for `HttpClient` which helps
simplify JSON request handling:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="11" language="csharp">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
using System.Text.Json;

internal static class HttpClientExt
{
    public static async Task<JsonDocument> ReadJsonDocumentAsync(this HttpClient client, string requestUri)
    {
        using var response = await client.GetAsync(requestUri);
        response.EnsureSuccessStatusCode();
        return await JsonDocument.ParseAsync(await response.Content.ReadAsStreamAsync());
    }
}
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Next, define a class with the tool execution handlers
for querying and converting responses from the National Weather Service
API:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="59" language="csharp">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
using ModelContextProtocol.Server;
using System.ComponentModel;
using System.Globalization;
using System.Text.Json;

namespace QuickstartWeatherServer.Tools;

[McpServerToolType]
public static class WeatherTools
{
    [McpServerTool, Description("Get weather alerts for a US state code.")]
    public static async Task<string> GetAlerts(
        HttpClient client,
        [Description("The US state code to get alerts for.")] string state)
    {
        using var jsonDocument = await client.ReadJsonDocumentAsync($"/alerts/active/area/{state}");
        var jsonElement = jsonDocument.RootElement;
        var alerts = jsonElement.GetProperty("features").EnumerateArray();

        if (!alerts.Any())
        {
            return "No active alerts for this state.";
        }

        return string.Join("\n--\n", alerts.Select(alert =>
        {
            JsonElement properties = alert.GetProperty("properties");
            return $"""
                    Event: {properties.GetProperty("event").GetString()}
                    Area: {properties.GetProperty("areaDesc").GetString()}
                    Severity: {properties.GetProperty("severity").GetString()}
                    Description: {properties.GetProperty("description").GetString()}
                    Instruction: {properties.GetProperty("instruction").GetString()}
                    """;
        }));
    }

    [McpServerTool, Description("Get weather forecast for a location.")]
    public static async Task<string> GetForecast(
        HttpClient client,
        [Description("Latitude of the location.")] double latitude,
        [Description("Longitude of the location.")] double longitude)
    {
        var pointUrl = string.Create(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, $"/points/{latitude},{longitude}");
        using var jsonDocument = await client.ReadJsonDocumentAsync(pointUrl);
        var forecastUrl = jsonDocument.RootElement.GetProperty("properties").GetProperty("forecast").GetString()
            ?? throw new Exception($"No forecast URL provided by {client.BaseAddress}points/{latitude},{longitude}");

        using var forecastDocument = await client.ReadJsonDocumentAsync(forecastUrl);
        var periods = forecastDocument.RootElement.GetProperty("properties").GetProperty("periods").EnumerateArray();

        return string.Join("\n---\n", periods.Select(period => $"""
                {period.GetProperty("name").GetString()}
                Temperature: {period.GetProperty("temperature").GetInt32()}°F
                Wind: {period.GetProperty("windSpeed").GetString()} {period.GetProperty("windDirection").GetString()}
                Forecast: {period.GetProperty("detailedForecast").GetString()}
                """));
    }
}
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

href="build-server.html#testing-your-server-with-claude-for-desktop-5"

aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

<span class="cursor-pointer">Testing your server with Claude for
Desktop</span>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20"
callout-type="note">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">Claude for Desktop is not yet available on Linux.
Linux users can proceed to the
<a href="build-client.html" class="link">Building a client</a> tutorial
to build an MCP client that connects to the server we just built.</span>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">First, make sure you have Claude for Desktop
installed.
<a href="https://claude.ai/download" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">You can install the latest version here.</a> If you
already have Claude for Desktop, **make sure it’s updated to the latest
version.** We’ll need to configure Claude for Desktop for whichever MCP
servers you want to use. To do this, open your Claude for Desktop App
configuration at
`~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json` in a
text editor. Make sure to create the file if it doesn’t exist. For
example, if you have
<a href="https://code.visualstudio.com/" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">VS Code</a> installed:</span>

<div class="code-group p-0.5 mt-5 mb-8 flex flex-col not-prose relative rounded-2xl border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 min-w-0 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:codeblock-dark text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light"
dir="ltr" orientation="horizontal">

``` shiki
  "mcpServers": {
    "weather": {
      "command": "dotnet",
      "args": ["run", "--project", "/ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/PROJECT", "--no-build"]
    }
  }
}
```

<span data-as="p">This tells Claude for Desktop:</span>

1.  There’s an MCP server named “weather”
2.  Launch it by running `dotnet run /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/PROJECT` Save the
    file, and restart **Claude for Desktop**.

</div>

<div id="panel-ruby-5"
class="prose dark:prose-dark overflow-x-auto [&_[data-table-wrapper]]:![--page-padding:0px] [&_[role="listitem"]]:pl-4 [&>:first-child:not(p)]:mt-0 [&>:first-child:not(p)_img]:mt-0 [&>:first-child[data-table-wrapper]]:!pt-0 hidden"
role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="ruby" component-part="tab-content">

<span data-as="p">Let’s get started with building our weather server! <a
href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/quickstart-resources/tree/main/weather-server-ruby"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">You can find the complete
code for what we’ll be building here.</a></span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#prerequisite-knowledge-5"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Prerequisite knowledge</span>

<span data-as="p">This quickstart assumes you have familiarity
with:</span>

- Ruby
- LLMs like Claude

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#logging-in-mcp-servers-6"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Logging in MCP Servers</span>

<span data-as="p">When implementing MCP servers, be careful about how
you handle logging:</span><span data-as="p">**For STDIO-based servers:**
Never use `puts` or `print`, as they write to standard output (stdout)
by default. Writing to stdout will corrupt the JSON-RPC messages and
break your server.</span><span data-as="p">**For HTTP-based servers:**
Standard output logging is fine since it doesn’t interfere with HTTP
responses.</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#best-practices-6"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Best Practices</span>

- Use a logging library that writes to stderr or files.

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
# ❌ Bad (STDIO)
puts "Processing request"

# ✅ Good (STDIO)
require "logger"
logger = Logger.new($stderr)
logger.info("Processing request")
```

component-part="code-group-tab-content">

``` shiki
# Create a new directory for our project
mkdir weather
cd weather

# Create a Gemfile
bundle init

# Add the MCP SDK dependency
bundle add mcp

# Create our server file
touch weather.rb
```

###

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

<span class="cursor-pointer">Importing packages and setting up
constants</span>

<span data-as="p">Open `weather.rb` and add these requires and constants
at the top:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="7" language="ruby">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
require "json"
require "mcp"
require "net/http"
require "uri"

NWS_API_BASE = "https://api.weather.gov"
USER_AGENT = "weather-app/1.0"
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">The `mcp` gem provides the Model Context Protocol SDK
for Ruby, with classes for server implementation and stdio
transport.</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#helper-methods"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Helper methods</span>

<span data-as="p">Next, let’s add helper methods for querying and
formatting data from the National Weather Service API:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="28" language="ruby">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
module HelperMethods
  def make_nws_request(url)
    uri = URI(url)
    request = Net::HTTP::Get.new(uri)
    request["User-Agent"] = USER_AGENT
    request["Accept"] = "application/geo+json"

    response = Net::HTTP.start(uri.hostname, uri.port, use_ssl: true) do |http|
      http.request(request)
    end

    raise "HTTP #{response.code}: #{response.message}" unless response.is_a?(Net::HTTPSuccess)

    JSON.parse(response.body)
  end

  def format_alert(feature)
    properties = feature["properties"]

    <<~ALERT
      Event: #{properties["event"] || "Unknown"}
      Area: #{properties["areaDesc"] || "Unknown"}
      Severity: #{properties["severity"] || "Unknown"}
      Description: #{properties["description"] || "No description available"}
      Instructions: #{properties["instruction"] || "No specific instructions provided"}
    ALERT
  end
end
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#implementing-tool-execution-4"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Implementing tool execution</span>

<span data-as="p">Now let’s define our tool classes. Each tool
subclasses `MCP::Tool` and implements the tool logic:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="79" language="ruby">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
class GetAlerts < MCP::Tool
  extend HelperMethods

  tool_name "get_alerts"
  description "Get weather alerts for a US state"
  input_schema(
    properties: {
      state: {
        type: "string",
        description: "Two-letter US state code (e.g. CA, NY)"
      }
    },
    required: ["state"]
  )

  def self.call(state:)
    url = "#{NWS_API_BASE}/alerts/active/area/#{state.upcase}"
    data = make_nws_request(url)

    if data["features"].empty?
      return MCP::Tool::Response.new([{
        type: "text",
        text: "No active alerts for this state."
      }])
    end

    alerts = data["features"].map { |feature| format_alert(feature) }
    MCP::Tool::Response.new([{
      type: "text",
      text: alerts.join("\n---\n")
    }])
  end
end

class GetForecast < MCP::Tool
  extend HelperMethods

  tool_name "get_forecast"
  description "Get weather forecast for a location"
  input_schema(
    properties: {
      latitude: {
        type: "number",
        description: "Latitude of the location"
      },
      longitude: {
        type: "number",
        description: "Longitude of the location"
      }
    },
    required: ["latitude", "longitude"]
  )

  def self.call(latitude:, longitude:)
    # First get the forecast grid endpoint.
    points_url = "#{NWS_API_BASE}/points/#{latitude},#{longitude}"
    points_data = make_nws_request(points_url)

    # Get the forecast URL from the points response.
    forecast_url = points_data["properties"]["forecast"]
    forecast_data = make_nws_request(forecast_url)

    # Format the periods into a readable forecast.
    periods = forecast_data["properties"]["periods"]
    forecasts = periods.first(5).map do |period|
      <<~FORECAST
        #{period["name"]}:
        Temperature: #{period["temperature"]}°#{period["temperatureUnit"]}
        Wind: #{period["windSpeed"]} #{period["windDirection"]}
        Forecast: #{period["detailedForecast"]}
      FORECAST
    end

    MCP::Tool::Response.new([{
      type: "text",
      text: forecasts.join("\n---\n")
    }])
  end
end
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#running-the-server-6"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Running the server</span>

<span data-as="p">Finally, initialize and run the server:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="8" language="ruby">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
server = MCP::Server.new(
  name: "weather",
  version: "1.0.0",
  tools: [GetAlerts, GetForecast]
)

transport = MCP::Server::Transports::StdioTransport.new(server)
transport.open
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Your server is complete! Run
`bundle exec ruby weather.rb` to start the MCP server, which will listen
for messages from MCP hosts.</span><span data-as="p">Let’s now test your
server from an existing MCP host, Claude for Desktop.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a
href="build-server.html#testing-your-server-with-claude-for-desktop-6"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Testing your server with Claude for
Desktop</span>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20"
callout-type="note">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">Claude for Desktop is not yet available on Linux.
Linux users can proceed to the
<a href="build-client.html" class="link">Building a client</a> tutorial
to build an MCP client that connects to the server we just built.</span>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">First, make sure you have Claude for Desktop
installed.
<a href="https://claude.ai/download" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">You can install the latest version here.</a> If you
already have Claude for Desktop, **make sure it’s updated to the latest
version.**</span><span data-as="p">We’ll need to configure Claude for
Desktop for whichever MCP servers you want to use. To do this, open your
Claude for Desktop App configuration at
`~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json` in a
text editor. Make sure to create the file if it doesn’t
exist.</span><span data-as="p">For example, if you have
<a href="https://code.visualstudio.com/" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">VS Code</a> installed:</span>

<div class="code-group p-0.5 mt-5 mb-8 flex flex-col not-prose relative rounded-2xl border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 min-w-0 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:codeblock-dark text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light"
dir="ltr" orientation="horizontal">

<div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 relative pr-2.5 *:first:*:ml-2.5"
component-part="code-group-tab-bar">

<div class="flex-1 w-0 text-xs leading-6 rounded-tl-xl gap-1 flex overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
role="tablist" aria-orientation="horizontal" tabindex="-1"
orientation="horizontal" style="outline:none">

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

macOS/Linux

</div>

<div class="absolute -bottom-1.5 left-0 right-0 h-0.5 rounded-full bg-primary dark:bg-primary-light peer-empty/title:hidden">

</div>

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

Windows

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex items-center justify-end shrink-0 gap-1.5">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

state="active" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"

component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:100%;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

component-part="code-group-tab-content">

``` shiki
code ~/Library/Application\ Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<div id="radix-_R_2kq9ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-1"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"

</div>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">You’ll then add your servers in the `mcpServers` key.
The MCP UI elements will only show up in Claude for Desktop if at least
one server is properly configured.</span><span data-as="p">In this case,
we’ll add our single weather server like so:</span>

<div class="code-group p-0.5 mt-5 mb-8 flex flex-col not-prose relative rounded-2xl border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 min-w-0 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:codeblock-dark text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light"
dir="ltr" orientation="horizontal">

<div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 relative pr-2.5 *:first:*:ml-2.5"
component-part="code-group-tab-bar">

<div class="flex-1 w-0 text-xs leading-6 rounded-tl-xl gap-1 flex overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
role="tablist" aria-orientation="horizontal" tabindex="-1"
orientation="horizontal" style="outline:none">

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

macOS/Linux

</div>

<div class="absolute -bottom-1.5 left-0 right-0 h-0.5 rounded-full bg-primary dark:bg-primary-light peer-empty/title:hidden">

</div>

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

Windows

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex items-center justify-end shrink-0 gap-1.5">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden">

<div id="radix-_R_2qq9ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-0"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="active" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_2qq9ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-0"
tabindex="-1" style="animation-duration:0s">

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-auto overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:100%;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre flex-none text-sm h-full leading-6"
component-part="code-group-tab-content">

``` shiki
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "weather": {
      "command": "bundle",
      "args": ["exec", "ruby", "weather.rb"],
      "cwd": "/ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/PARENT/FOLDER/weather"
    }
  }
}
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<div id="radix-_R_2qq9ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-1"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="inactive" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_2qq9ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-1" hidden=""
tabindex="-1">

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20"
callout-type="note">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">Make sure you pass in the absolute path to your
project directory in the `cwd` field. You can get this by running `pwd`
on macOS/Linux or `cd` on Windows Command Prompt from your project
directory. On Windows, remember to use double backslashes (`\\`) or
forward slashes (`/`) in the JSON path.</span>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">This tells Claude for Desktop:</span>

1.  There’s an MCP server named “weather”
2.  Launch it by running `bundle exec ruby weather.rb` in the specified
    directory

<span data-as="p">Save the file, and restart **Claude for
Desktop**.</span>

</div>

<div id="panel-rust-6"
class="prose dark:prose-dark overflow-x-auto [&_[data-table-wrapper]]:![--page-padding:0px] [&_[role="listitem"]]:pl-4 [&>:first-child:not(p)]:mt-0 [&>:first-child:not(p)_img]:mt-0 [&>:first-child[data-table-wrapper]]:!pt-0 hidden"
role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="rust" component-part="tab-content">

<span data-as="p">Let’s get started with building our weather server! <a
href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/quickstart-resources/tree/main/weather-server-rust"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">You can find the complete
code for what we’ll be building here.</a></span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#prerequisite-knowledge-6"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Prerequisite knowledge</span>

<span data-as="p">This quickstart assumes you have familiarity
with:</span>

- Rust programming language
- Async/await in Rust
- LLMs like Claude

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#logging-in-mcp-servers-7"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Logging in MCP Servers</span>

<span data-as="p">When implementing MCP servers, be careful about how
you handle logging:</span><span data-as="p">**For STDIO-based servers:**
Never use `println!()` or `print!()`, as they write to standard output
(stdout). Writing to stdout will corrupt the JSON-RPC messages and break
your server.</span><span data-as="p">**For HTTP-based servers:**
Standard output logging is fine since it doesn’t interfere with HTTP
responses.</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#best-practices-7"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Best Practices</span>

- Use a logging library that writes to stderr or files, such as
  `tracing` or `log` in Rust.
- Configure your logging framework to avoid stdout output.

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#quick-examples-4"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Quick Examples</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="5" language="rust">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
// ❌ Bad (STDIO)
println!("Processing request");

// ✅ Good (STDIO)
eprintln!("Processing request"); // writes to stderr
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#system-requirements-7"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">System requirements</span>

- Rust 1.70 or higher installed.
- Cargo (comes with Rust installation).

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build-server.html#set-up-your-environment-7"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Set up your environment</span>

<span data-as="p">First, let’s install Rust if you haven’t already. You
can install Rust from
<a href="https://www.rust-lang.org/tools/install" class="link"
target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">rust-lang.org</a>:</span>

<div class="code-group p-0.5 mt-5 mb-8 flex flex-col not-prose relative rounded-2xl border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 min-w-0 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:codeblock-dark text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light"
dir="ltr" orientation="horizontal">

<div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 relative pr-2.5 *:first:*:ml-2.5"
component-part="code-group-tab-bar">

<div class="flex-1 w-0 text-xs leading-6 rounded-tl-xl gap-1 flex overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
role="tablist" aria-orientation="horizontal" tabindex="-1"
